# Suede Docs

> Public documentation for Suede Labs AI: programmable IP, creator ownership, and agent-ready media commerce for the AI era. The canonical, most current source is the GitHub README at github.com/Suede-AI/suede-docs; this page (docs.suedeai.ai) mirrors its key facts.

Suede Labs AI (https://suedeai.ai) builds creator-ownership infrastructure for AI-native media. The public docs cover programmable IP, provenance, rights metadata, licensing workflows, and x402 and ACP discovery surfaces. AI music is one implementation area, not the whole product.

## Docs

- [Suede Docs: canonical README](https://github.com/Suede-AI/suede-docs): Public doc set with core pillars, product directory, x402 and ACP guidance, token references, profiles, and language guidance.
- [Live agent-commerce catalog](https://app.suedeai.ai/api/v1/catalog): Current public product availability and pricing in a schema.org ItemList response.
- [x402 discovery document](https://app.suedeai.ai/.well-known/x402): Machine-readable x402 routes published by the live app surface.
- [suede-sdk-python](https://github.com/Suede-AI/suede-sdk-python): Python SDK (`pip install suede-ai`) wrapping Suede's x402 endpoints as typed client methods.
- [suede-token](https://github.com/Suede-AI/suede-token): $SUEDE token contracts and chain references.
- [suede-creator-skills](https://github.com/JasonColapietro/suede-creator-skills): Free public agent-workflow skills for creators.

## Ecosystem

- [Suede Labs AI](https://suedeai.ai): Main product site with product, blog, and company information.
- [Suede Universe Map](https://map.suedeai.ai): Plain-English directory of public Suede sites, apps, and endpoints.
- [Jason Colapietro profile](https://suedeai.ai/founder): Public leadership profile on the main Suede site.
- [suedeai.org](https://suedeai.org): Thesis, books, and investor information.

## Optional

- [Suede IP Registry](https://ip.suedeai.ai): Public interface for provenance records and rights metadata.
- [Suede Scan](https://scan.suedeai.ai): Product page for checking a site's visibility across AI answer and search surfaces.
